tip: Place Scrooge early — he pays for himself in 3 waves.
Sherlock deals 0 damage but makes EVERYONE else hit harder.
Alice's cake slows enemies. Pair her with high-damage towers.
Robin Hood's Golden Arrow upgrade pierces every enemy in a line.
Dracula heals your lives by draining enemies. Place him on busy lanes.
The Phantom hits like a truck but attacks slowly. Quality over quantity.
Peter Pan attacks fastest in the game. Fairy Dust buffs nearby towers.
Frankenstein chains lightning to nearby enemies. Group your kills.
Merlin's spells bounce between enemies. More enemies = more bounces.
Tarzan pulls enemies toward him with vines. Great for stalling.
The Wicked Witch's monkeys fly over obstacles. Use them on tricky paths.
Shadow Author is expensive but can rewrite enemy stats. Worth the investment.
Captain Hook's cannons hit random enemies. Great for cleaning up stragglers.
Queen of Hearts spawns card soldiers that patrol automatically.
Clayton targets the STRONGEST enemy first. Perfect for boss waves.
Medusa's stone gaze freezes enemies solid. Time it for boss waves.
Anubis has a chance to resurrect killed enemies as YOUR allies.
The Headless Horseman's fear aura slows ALL nearby enemies passively.
Upgrade paths stack! T1 + T2 + T3 in one path = massive power.
You can only max ONE upgrade path per tower. Choose wisely.
Boss waves are marked with a skull. Save your gold for upgrades.
Tap a tower to change its targeting: First, Last, Close, or Strong.
Each character levels up across games. More XP = stronger base stats.
Progressive abilities unlock with total lifetime damage. Keep playing!
Hard Mode unlocks secret lore about the Shadow Author's true identity.
Act 4 is the true test. You'll need maxed upgrades and perfect strategy.
Some enemies split when killed. Save AoE attacks for those waves.
Place towers at path bends — they get more time to attack.
The Narrator isn't what he seems. Pay attention to his words...
Every character was pulled from a real public domain novel or myth.
